scripts.lint: python -m ruff check app.py ncai_app && python -m compileall -q app.py ncai_app && set PATH=%ProgramFiles%\nodejs;%PATH% && prettier --check "README.md" "templates/**/*.html" "static/**/*.css" "static/**/*.js" "scripts/**/*.mjs"
scripts.format: python -m ruff check --fix app.py ncai_app && python -m ruff format app.py ncai_app && set PATH=%ProgramFiles%\nodejs;%PATH% && prettier --write "README.md" "templates/**/*.html" "static/**/*.css" "static/**/*.js" "scripts/**/*.mjs"
scripts.lint:py: python -m ruff check app.py ncai_app && python -m compileall -q app.py ncai_app
scripts.format:py: python -m ruff check --fix app.py ncai_app && python -m ruff format app.py ncai_app
